en: There in in New Zealand where we filmed Lord of the Rings
ko: 우리가 반지의 제왕을 촬영한 뉴질랜드에서는, 운이 좋으면

en: If you're lucky when you leave you're given a piece of green stone carved and
ko: 떠날 때 조각된 초록색 돌을 받게 되고, 그걸 자주 착용하면

en: You wear it often enough and your chances are you'll get back to New Zealand. That's the idea and it'll bring you a bit of luck
ko: 뉴질랜드에 다시 돌아갈 확률이 높아져, 그런 의미야. 그리고 그게

en: When those films were nominated for something like 20 Oscars on that night everybody from New Zealand was wearing the green stone
And when we're on the red carpet going into the ceremony, I met Maggie Smith, you know, what are you what are you here for?
ko: 착용하고 있었어. 그리고 시상식에 들어가는 레드 카펫에서 매기 스미스를 만났어,

en: Well Lord of the Rings, oh, yeah, she said what's that round your neck? Oh, it's my Poonami, Maggie
ko: 네 목에 있는 건 뭐야? 아, 이건 내 푸나미야, 매기.

en: I own your Poonami. What's that for? I said, well if I wear it, it'll bring me luck and

ko: 나는 이걸 착용하면 행운이 온다고 했고, 난 아주 좋은 사람이야.
